# Matter: NDA triage week 21

## Key facts

Batch of 10 inbound NDAs from various prospective counterparties (SaaS vendor, logistics partner, co-bidder, ERP consultant, research institute, manufacturer, cloud provider, etc.) accumulated over week 21 2026. Counsel needs to triage GREEN/YELLOW/RED per NDA, identify which need full legal review vs which can go to sign. Matter folder will receive NDAs in two waves: 6 initial + 4 added later.

## Matter-specific overrides

_None yet._

## Key facts

Batch of 10 inbound NDAs from various prospective counterparties (SaaS vendor, logistics partner, co-bidder, ERP consultant, research institute, manufacturer, cloud provider, etc.) accumulated over week 21 2026. <!-- FILE: src/adeu/templates/markdown_ui.html -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Adeu Markdown UI</title>
    <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Jost:wght@400;500;600&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,600;1,600&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --brand-sand: #e8c0a1;
            --brand-sand-light: #f2d9c7;
            --brand-sand-dark: #d4a882;
            --brand-mint: #e6f3f0;
            --brand-mint-dark: #c9e4de;
            --brand-navy: #1a2a2c;
            --brand-navy-light: #2a3a3c;
            --brand-mauve: #dacad2;
            --neutral-50: #fafafa;
            --neutral-100: #f5f5f5;
            --neutral-200: #e5e5e5;
            --neutral-300: #d9d9d9;
            --neutral-600: #555969;
            --neutral-800: #1e2028;
            --neutral-900: #171717;
            --font-lora: 'Lora', Georgia, serif;
            --font-jost: 'Jost', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            --bg-body: var(--neutral-50);
            --bg-card: #ffffff;
            --border-card: var(--neutral-200);
            --text-main: var(--neutral-600);
            --text-heading: var(--brand-navy);
            --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.15);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            :root {
                --bg-body: var(--neutral-900);
                --bg-card: var(--brand-navy);
                --border-card: var(--brand-navy-light);
                --text-main: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
                --text-heading: #ffffff;
                --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.1);
                --neutral-100: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        html,
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            color: var(--text-main);
            line-height: 1.6;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            padding: 16px;
        }

        .adeu-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .navbar {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            position: relative;
        }

        .logo-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .nav-title {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            max-width: 40%;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .nav-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            flex: 1;
        }

        #copy-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #copy-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        #open-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #open-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #copy-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
            #open-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        .logo-container svg {
            max-width: 80px;
            height: auto;
        }

        .logo-container svg path,
        .logo-container svg rect,
        .logo-container svg polygon,
        .logo-container svg circle {
            transition: fill 0.2s ease;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {

            .logo-container svg path,
            .logo-container svg rect,
            .logo-container svg polygon,
            .logo-container svg circle,
            .logo-container svg {
                fill: #ffffff !important;
            }
        }

        .content-wrapper {
            position: relative;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background-color: var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #app {
            padding: 32px;
            display: flow-root;
        }

        .fade-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 80px;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), var(--bg-card));
            pointer-events: none;
            display: none;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .fade-overlay {
                background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(26, 42, 44, 0), var(--bg-card));
            }
        }

        .toggle-container {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: none;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
        }

        #toggle-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #toggle-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #toggle-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        #toggle-icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        h1,
        h2,
        h3,
        h4 {
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 1.5em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 2.25rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            padding-bottom: 0.3em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.75rem;
        }

        h3 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

        a {
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            text-decoration: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: border 0.2s ease;
        }

        a:hover {
            border-bottom-color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
        }

        strong {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
        }

        ul,
        ol {
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        li {
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        blockquote {
            border-left: 4px solid var(--brand-sand);
            padding: 12px 20px;
            margin: 24px 0;
            color: var(--text-main);
            background: var(--bg-blockquote);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        code {
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            background: var(--neutral-100);
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        pre code {
            display: block;
            padding: 16px;
            background: var(--neutral-900);
            color: #e5e5e5;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        .skeleton {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--neutral-100) 25%, var(--border-card) 50%, var(--neutral-100) 75%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: skeleton 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        @keyframes skeleton {
            0% {
                background-position: 200% 0;
            }

            100% {
                background-position: -200% 0;
            }
        }

        .alert {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            background-color: #fef2f2;
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            color: #991b1b;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .alert {
                background-color: rgba(127, 29, 29, 0.2);
                border-color: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.3);
                color: #fca5a5;
            }
        }

        .alert-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1.1em;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
        }

        .alert-body {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 0.95em;
        }

        .alert-details {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-break: break-all;
            margin-top: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
    </style>

</svg>

            </div>

            <div class="nav-title" id="nav-title"></div>

            <div class="nav-actions">
                <button id="copy-btn" title="Copy Markdown">
                    <svg id="copy-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                        <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="copy-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
                <button id="open-btn" title="Open in Native App">
                    <svg id="open-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" 
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path>
                        <polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"></polyline>
                        <line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"></line>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="open-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </nav>

        <div class="content-wrapper" id="content-wrapper">
            <div id="app">
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 36px; width: 40%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 95%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 90%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 80%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="fade-overlay" id="fade-overlay"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="toggle-container" id="toggle-container">
            <button id="toggle-btn">
                <span id="toggle-text">Show More</span>
                <svg id="toggle-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="transform: rotate(0deg);">
                    <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const appDiv = document.getElementById('app');
        const INIT_ID = 1;
        let isExpanded = false; // START COLLAPSED BY DEFAULT!

        let rawMarkdownText = "";
        let currentFilePath = null;
        const navTitle = document.getElementById('nav-title');
        const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
        const copyIcon = document.getElementById('copy-icon');
        const copyText = document.getElementById('copy-text');
        const openBtn = document.getElementById('open-btn');
        const openText = document.getElementById('open-text');

        function fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(text) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const textArea = document.createElement("textarea");
                textArea.value = text;
                textArea.style.top = "0";
                textArea.style.left = "0";
                textArea.style.position = "fixed";
                textArea.style.opacity = "0";

                document.body.appendChild(textArea);
                textArea.focus();
                textArea.select();

                try {
                    const successful = document.execCommand('copy');
                    if (successful) {
                        resolve();
                    } else {
                        reject(new Error("execCommand returned false"));
                    }
                } catch (err) {
                    reject(err);
                } finally {
                    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                }
            });
        }

        copyBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
            try {
                if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
                    try {
                        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(rawMarkdownText);
                    } catch (e) {
                        await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                    }
                } else {
                    await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                }

                const originalSvg = copyIcon.innerHTML;
                copyIcon.innerHTML = `<polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>`;

                copyText.textContent = "Copied!";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.style.color = "#10b981";

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyIcon.innerHTML = originalSvg;
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.style.color = "";
                }, 2000);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Failed to copy text: ', err);
                copyText.textContent = "Failed";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.title = err.toString();

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.title = "Copy Markdown";
                }, 3000);
            }
        });

        openBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!currentFilePath) return;

            const reqId = Date.now();

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                id: reqId,
                method: "tools/call",
                params: {
                    name: "open_local_file",
                    arguments: {
                        file_path: currentFilePath
                    }
                }
            }, "*");

            openText.textContent = "Opening...";
            openText.style.display = "inline";
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                openText.style.display = "none";
                openText.textContent = "";
            }, 2000);
        });

        function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
            return (unsafe || "").toString()
                .replace(/&/g, "&")
                .replace(/</g, "<")
                .replace(/>/g, ">")
                .replace(/"/g, """)
                .replace(/'/g, "'");
        }

        function showError(title, message, details = null) {
            let html = `
            <div class="alert">
                <div class="alert-title">
                    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"></line></svg>
                    ${escapeHtml(title)}
                </div>
                <div class="alert-body">${escapeHtml(message)}</div>
            `;
            if (details) {
                html += `<div class="alert-details">${escapeHtml(details)}</div>`;
            }
            html += `</div>`;
            appDiv.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function checkCollapsible() {
            const wrapper = document.getElementById('content-wrapper');
            const toggleContainer = document.getElementById('toggle-container');
            const fadeOverlay = document.getElementById('fade-overlay');
            const toggleIcon = document.getElementById('toggle-icon');
            const toggleText = document.getElementById('toggle-text');

            // 1. If no markdown, we are showing the skeleton. Do not collapse!
            if (!rawMarkdownText) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                triggerResize();
                return;
            }

            // 2. Data is loaded
            const realHeight = appDiv.scrollHeight;
            const COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD = 300;
            const COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = 150;
            const EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT = 500;

            if (realHeight > COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                if (isExpanded) {
                    // Open view! Scroll inside max 500px window
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'auto';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show Less';
                } else {
                    // Collapsed View
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = COLLAPSED_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'hidden';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'block';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show More';
                }
            } else {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
            }

            triggerResize();
        }

        document.getElementById('toggle-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            isExpanded = !isExpanded;
            checkCollapsible();
        });

        function triggerResize() {
            // Measure the exact unconstrained height of the outer card
            const card = document.querySelector('.adeu-card');
            const containerChrome = 34; // 16px padding top/bottom + 2px borders

            const requestedHeight = card.offsetHeight + containerChrome;

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                params: { height: Math.ceil(requestedHeight), width: 600 }
            }, "*");
        }

        window.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
            try {
                if (!event.data || event.data.jsonrpc !== "2.0") return;
                const msg = event.data;

                if (msg.id === INIT_ID) {
                    window.parent.postMessage({
                        jsonrpc: "2.0",
                        method: "ui/notifications/initialized",
                        params: {}
                    }, "*");
                    return;
                }

                if (msg.method === "ui/notifications/tool-result") {
                    if (window.__MARKED_ERROR || typeof marked === 'undefined') {
                        showError("Missing Dependency", "The Markdown renderer failed to load.", window.__MARKED_ERROR || "marked is undefined.");
                        return;
                    }

                    const result = msg.params;

                    // If the state is pending, or no markdown is returned, completely hide the UI
                    if (!result || !result.structuredContent || result.structuredContent.status === "pending" || !result.structuredContent.markdown) {
                        document.documentElement.style.display = 'none';
                        window.parent.postMessage({
                            jsonrpc: "2.0",
                            method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                            params: { height: 0, width: 0 }
                        }, "*");
                        return;
                    }

                    // Render Markdown
                    rawMarkdownText = result.structuredContent.markdown;
                    if (result.structuredContent.file_path) {
                        currentFilePath = result.structuredContent.file_path;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'flex';
                    } else {
                        currentFilePath = null;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                    appDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(rawMarkdownText);
                    copyBtn.style.display = 'flex';

                    if (result.structuredContent.title) {
                        navTitle.textContent = result.structuredContent.title;
                        navTitle.title = result.structuredContent.title;
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                showError("Rendering Engine Error", "An unexpected error occurred.", error.toString() + "\n" + error.stack);
            }
        });

        const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => {
            checkCollapsible();
        });
        observer.observe(appDiv);

        window.parent.postMessage({
            jsonrpc: "2.0",
            id: INIT_ID,
            method: "ui/initialize",
            params: {
                appInfo: { name: "Adeu Markdown UI", version: "1.1.0" },
                appCapabilities: {},
                protocolVersion: "2025-11-21"
            }
        }, "*");
    </script>
</body>

</html>

contents.text:
<!-- FILE: src/adeu/templates/markdown_ui.html -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Adeu Markdown UI</title>
    <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Jost:wght@400;500;600&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,600;1,600&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --brand-sand: #e8c0a1;
            --brand-sand-light: #f2d9c7;
            --brand-sand-dark: #d4a882;
            --brand-mint: #e6f3f0;
            --brand-mint-dark: #c9e4de;
            --brand-navy: #1a2a2c;
            --brand-navy-light: #2a3a3c;
            --brand-mauve: #dacad2;
            --neutral-50: #fafafa;
            --neutral-100: #f5f5f5;
            --neutral-200: #e5e5e5;
            --neutral-300: #d9d9d9;
            --neutral-600: #555969;
            --neutral-800: #1e2028;
            --neutral-900: #171717;
            --font-lora: 'Lora', Georgia, serif;
            --font-jost: 'Jost', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            --bg-body: var(--neutral-50);
            --bg-card: #ffffff;
            --border-card: var(--neutral-200);
            --text-main: var(--neutral-600);
            --text-heading: var(--brand-navy);
            --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.15);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            :root {
                --bg-body: var(--neutral-900);
                --bg-card: var(--brand-navy);
                --border-card: var(--brand-navy-light);
                --text-main: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
                --text-heading: #ffffff;
                --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.1);
                --neutral-100: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        html,
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            color: var(--text-main);
            line-height: 1.6;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            padding: 16px;
        }

        .adeu-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .navbar {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            position: relative;
        }

        .logo-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .nav-title {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            max-width: 40%;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .nav-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            flex: 1;
        }

        #copy-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #copy-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        #open-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #open-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #copy-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
            #open-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        .logo-container svg {
            max-width: 80px;
            height: auto;
        }

        .logo-container svg path,
        .logo-container svg rect,
        .logo-container svg polygon,
        .logo-container svg circle {
            transition: fill 0.2s ease;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {

            .logo-container svg path,
            .logo-container svg rect,
            .logo-container svg polygon,
            .logo-container svg circle,
            .logo-container svg {
                fill: #ffffff !important;
            }
        }

        .content-wrapper {
            position: relative;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background-color: var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #app {
            padding: 32px;
            display: flow-root;
        }

        .fade-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 80px;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), var(--bg-card));
            pointer-events: none;
            display: none;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .fade-overlay {
                background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(26, 42, 44, 0), var(--bg-card));
            }
        }

        .toggle-container {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: none;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
        }

        #toggle-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #toggle-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #toggle-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        #toggle-icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        h1,
        h2,
        h3,
        h4 {
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 1.5em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 2.25rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            padding-bottom: 0.3em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.75rem;
        }

        h3 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

        a {
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            text-decoration: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: border 0.2s ease;
        }

        a:hover {
            border-bottom-color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
        }

        strong {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
        }

        ul,
        ol {
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        li {
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        blockquote {
            border-left: 4px solid var(--brand-sand);
            padding: 12px 20px;
            margin: 24px 0;
            color: var(--text-main);
            background: var(--bg-blockquote);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        code {
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            background: var(--neutral-100);
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        pre code {
            display: block;
            padding: 16px;
            background: var(--neutral-900);
            color: #e5e5e5;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        .skeleton {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--neutral-100) 25%, var(--border-card) 50%, var(--neutral-100) 75%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: skeleton 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        @keyframes skeleton {
            0% {
                background-position: 200% 0;
            }

            100% {
                background-position: -200% 0;
            }
        }

        .alert {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            background-color: #fef2f2;
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            color: #991b1b;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .alert {
                background-color: rgba(127, 29, 29, 0.2);
                border-color: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.3);
                color: #fca5a5;
            }
        }

        .alert-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1.1em;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
        }

        .alert-body {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 0.95em;
        }

        .alert-details {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-break: break-all;
            margin-top: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
    </style>

255.543 20.112V20.1141ZM230.881 36.7009C231.139 34.9576 231.626 33.4303 232.353 32.1251C233.479 30.1023 235.013 28.576 236.953 27.5473C238.894 26.5218 241.023 26.0085 243.337 26.0085C246.592 26.0085 64.1938 294.195 64.9815 290.565 64.9815C286.747 64.9815 283.476 64.2408 280.753 62.7604C278.033 61.28 275.95 59.0433 274.511 56.0533C273.071 53.0633 272.35 49.3618 272.35 304.322 49.8C305.356 47.8376 305.872 45.435 305.872 42.5942V18.2123H317.137H317.136Z" fill="#1E2028"/>
</svg>

            </div>

            <div class="nav-title" id="nav-title"></div>

            <div class="nav-actions">
                <button id="copy-btn" title="Copy Markdown">
                    <svg id="copy-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                        <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="copy-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
                <button id="open-btn" title="Open in Native App">
                    <svg id="open-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" 
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path>
                        <polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"></polyline>
                        <line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"></line>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="open-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </nav>

        <div class="content-wrapper" id="content-wrapper">
            <div id="app">
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 36px; width: 40%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 95%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 90%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 80%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="fade-overlay" id="fade-overlay"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="toggle-container" id="toggle-container">
            <button id="toggle-btn">
                <span id="toggle-text">Show More</span>
                <svg id="toggle-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="transform: rotate(0deg);">
                    <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const appDiv = document.getElementById('app');
        const INIT_ID = 1;
        let isExpanded = false; // START COLLAPSED BY DEFAULT!

        let rawMarkdownText = "";
        let currentFilePath = null;
        const navTitle = document.getElementById('nav-title');
        const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
        const copyIcon = document.getElementById('copy-icon');
        const copyText = document.getElementById('copy-text');
        const openBtn = document.getElementById('open-btn');
        const openText = document.getElementById('open-text');

        function fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(text) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const textArea = document.createElement("textarea");
                textArea.value = text;
                textArea.style.top = "0";
                textArea.style.left = "0";
                textArea.style.position = "fixed";
                textArea.style.opacity = "0";

                document.body.appendChild(textArea);
                textArea.focus();
                textArea.select();

                try {
                    const successful = document.execCommand('copy');
                    if (successful) {
                        resolve();
                    } else {
                        reject(new Error("execCommand returned false"));
                    }
                } catch (err) {
                    reject(err);
                } finally {
                    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                }
            });
        }

        copyBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
            try {
                if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
                    try {
                        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(rawMarkdownText);
                    } catch (e) {
                        await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                    }
                } else {
                    await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                }

                const originalSvg = copyIcon.innerHTML;
                copyIcon.innerHTML = `<polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>`;

                copyText.textContent = "Copied!";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.style.color = "#10b981";

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyIcon.innerHTML = originalSvg;
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.style.color = "";
                }, 2000);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Failed to copy text: ', err);
                copyText.textContent = "Failed";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.title = err.toString();

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.title = "Copy Markdown";
                }, 3000);
            }
        });

        openBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!currentFilePath) return;

            const reqId = Date.now();

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                id: reqId,
                method: "tools/call",
                params: {
                    name: "open_local_file",
                    arguments: {
                        file_path: currentFilePath
                    }
                }
            }, "*");

            openText.textContent = "Opening...";
            openText.style.display = "inline";
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                openText.style.display = "none";
                openText.textContent = "";
            }, 2000);
        });

        function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
            return (unsafe || "").toString()
                .replace(/&/g, "&")
                .replace(/</g, "<")
                .replace(/>/g, ">")
                .replace(/"/g, """)
                .replace(/'/g, "'");
        }

        function showError(title, message, details = null) {
            let html = `
            <div class="alert">
                <div class="alert-title">
                    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"></line></svg>
                    ${escapeHtml(title)}
                </div>
                <div class="alert-body">${escapeHtml(message)}</div>
            `;
            if (details) {
                html += `<div class="alert-details">${escapeHtml(details)}</div>`;
            }
            html += `</div>`;
            appDiv.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function checkCollapsible() {
            const wrapper = document.getElementById('content-wrapper');
            const toggleContainer = document.getElementById('toggle-container');
            const fadeOverlay = document.getElementById('fade-overlay');
            const toggleIcon = document.getElementById('toggle-icon');
            const toggleText = document.getElementById('toggle-text');

            // 1. If no markdown, we are showing the skeleton. Do not collapse!
            if (!rawMarkdownText) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                triggerResize();
                return;
            }

            // 2. Data is loaded
            const realHeight = appDiv.scrollHeight;
            const COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD = 300;
            const COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = 150;
            const EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT = 500;

            if (realHeight > COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                if (isExpanded) {
                    // Open view! Scroll inside max 500px window
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'auto';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show Less';
                } else {
                    // Collapsed View
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = COLLAPSED_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'hidden';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'block';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show More';
                }
            } else {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
            }

            triggerResize();
        }

        document.getElementById('toggle-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            isExpanded = !isExpanded;
            checkCollapsible();
        });

        function triggerResize() {
            // Measure the exact unconstrained height of the outer card
            const card = document.querySelector('.adeu-card');
            const containerChrome = 34; // 16px padding top/bottom + 2px borders

            const requestedHeight = card.offsetHeight + containerChrome;

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                params: { height: Math.ceil(requestedHeight), width: 600 }
            }, "*");
        }

        window.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
            try {
                if (!event.data || event.data.jsonrpc !== "2.0") return;
                const msg = event.data;

                if (msg.id === INIT_ID) {
                    window.parent.postMessage({
                        jsonrpc: "2.0",
                        method: "ui/notifications/initialized",
                        params: {}
                    }, "*");
                    return;
                }

                if (msg.method === "ui/notifications/tool-result") {
                    if (window.__MARKED_ERROR || typeof marked === 'undefined') {
                        showError("Missing Dependency", "The Markdown renderer failed to load.", window.__MARKED_ERROR || "marked is undefined.");
                        return;
                    }

                    const result = msg.params;

                    // If the state is pending, or no markdown is returned, completely hide the UI
                    if (!result || !result.structuredContent || result.structuredContent.status === "pending" || !result.structuredContent.markdown) {
                        document.documentElement.style.display = 'none';
                        window.parent.postMessage({
                            jsonrpc: "2.0",
                            method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                            params: { height: 0, width: 0 }
                        }, "*");
                        return;
                    }

                    // Render Markdown
                    rawMarkdownText = result.structuredContent.markdown;
                    if (result.structuredContent.file_path) {
                        currentFilePath = result.structuredContent.file_path;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'flex';
                    } else {
                        currentFilePath = null;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                    appDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(rawMarkdownText);
                    copyBtn.style.display = 'flex';

                    if (result.structuredContent.title) {
                        navTitle.textContent = result.structuredContent.title;
                        navTitle.title = result.structuredContent.title;
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                showError("Rendering Engine Error", "An unexpected error occurred.", error.toString() + "\n" + error.stack);
            }
        });

        const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => {
            checkCollapsible();
        });
        observer.observe(appDiv);

        window.parent.postMessage({
            jsonrpc: "2.0",
            id: INIT_ID,
            method: "ui/initialize",
            params: {
                appInfo: { name: "Adeu Markdown UI", version: "1.1.0" },
                appCapabilities: {},
                protocolVersion: "2025-11-21"
            }
        }, "*");
    </script>
</body>

</html>

contents.text:
<!-- FILE: src/adeu/templates/markdown_ui.html -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Adeu Markdown UI</title>
    <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Jost:wght@400;500;600&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,600;1,600&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --brand-sand: #e8c0a1;
            --brand-sand-light: #f2d9c7;
            --brand-sand-dark: #d4a882;
            --brand-mint: #e6f3f0;
            --brand-mint-dark: #c9e4de;
            --brand-navy: #1a2a2c;
            --brand-navy-light: #2a3a3c;
            --brand-mauve: #dacad2;
            --neutral-50: #fafafa;
            --neutral-100: #f5f5f5;
            --neutral-200: #e5e5e5;
            --neutral-300: #d9d9d9;
            --neutral-600: #555969;
            --neutral-800: #1e2028;
            --neutral-900: #171717;
            --font-lora: 'Lora', Georgia, serif;
            --font-jost: 'Jost', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            --bg-body: var(--neutral-50);
            --bg-card: #ffffff;
            --border-card: var(--neutral-200);
            --text-main: var(--neutral-600);
            --text-heading: var(--brand-navy);
            --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.15);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            :root {
                --bg-body: var(--neutral-900);
                --bg-card: var(--brand-navy);
                --border-card: var(--brand-navy-light);
                --text-main: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
                --text-heading: #ffffff;
                --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.1);
                --neutral-100: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        html,
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            color: var(--text-main);
            line-height: 1.6;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            padding: 16px;
        }

        .adeu-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .navbar {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            position: relative;
        }

        .logo-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .nav-title {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            max-width: 40%;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .nav-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            flex: 1;
        }

        #copy-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #copy-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        #open-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #open-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #copy-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
            #open-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        .logo-container svg {
            max-width: 80px;
            height: auto;
        }

        .logo-container svg path,
        .logo-container svg rect,
        .logo-container svg polygon,
        .logo-container svg circle {
            transition: fill 0.2s ease;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {

            .logo-container svg path,
            .logo-container svg rect,
            .logo-container svg polygon,
            .logo-container svg circle,
            .logo-container svg {
                fill: #ffffff !important;
            }
        }

        .content-wrapper {
            position: relative;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background-color: var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #app {
            padding: 32px;
            display: flow-root;
        }

        .fade-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 80px;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), var(--bg-card));
            pointer-events: none;
            display: none;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .fade-overlay {
                background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(26, 42, 44, 0), var(--bg-card));
            }
        }

        .toggle-container {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: none;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
        }

        #toggle-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #toggle-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #toggle-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        #toggle-icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        h1,
        h2,
        h3,
        h4 {
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 1.5em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 2.25rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            padding-bottom: 0.3em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.75rem;
        }

        h3 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

        a {
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            text-decoration: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: border 0.2s ease;
        }

        a:hover {
            border-bottom-color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
        }

        strong {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
        }

        ul,
        ol {
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        li {
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        blockquote {
            border-left: 4px solid var(--brand-sand);
            padding: 12px 20px;
            margin: 24px 0;
            color: var(--text-main);
            background: var(--bg-blockquote);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        code {
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            background: var(--neutral-100);
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        pre code {
            display: block;
            padding: 16px;
            background: var(--neutral-900);
            color: #e5e5e5;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        .skeleton {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--neutral-100) 25%, var(--border-card) 50%, var(--neutral-100) 75%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: skeleton 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        @keyframes skeleton {
            0% {
                background-position: 200% 0;
            }

            100% {
                background-position: -200% 0;
            }
        }

        .alert {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            background-color: #fef2f2;
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            color: #991b1b;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .alert {
                background-color: rgba(127, 29, 29, 0.2);
                border-color: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.3);
                color: #fca5a5;
            }
        }

        .alert-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1.1em;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
        }

        .alert-body {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 0.95em;
        }

        .alert-details {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-break: break-all;
            margin-top: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }

            </div>

            <div class="nav-title" id="nav-title"></div>

            <div class="nav-actions">
                <button id="copy-btn" title="Copy Markdown">
                    <svg id="copy-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                        <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="copy-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
                <button id="open-btn" title="Open in Native App">
                    <svg id="open-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" 
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path>
                        <polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"></polyline>
                        <line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"></line>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="open-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </nav>

        <div class="content-wrapper" id="content-wrapper">
            <div id="app">
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 36px; width: 40%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 95%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 90%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 80%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="fade-overlay" id="fade-overlay"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="toggle-container" id="toggle-container">
            <button id="toggle-btn">
                <span id="toggle-text">Show More</span>
                <svg id="toggle-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="transform: rotate(0deg);">
                    <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const appDiv = document.getElementById('app');
        const INIT_ID = 1;
        let isExpanded = false; // START COLLAPSED BY DEFAULT!

        let rawMarkdownText = "";
        let currentFilePath = null;
        const navTitle = document.getElementById('nav-title');
        const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
        const copyIcon = document.getElementById('copy-icon');
        const copyText = document.getElementById('copy-text');
        const openBtn = document.getElementById('open-btn');
        const openText = document.getElementById('open-text');

        function fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(text) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const textArea = document.createElement("textarea");
                textArea.value = text;
                textArea.style.top = "0";
                textArea.style.left = "0";
                textArea.style.position = "fixed";
                textArea.style.opacity = "0";

                document.body.appendChild(textArea);
                textArea.focus();
                textArea.select();

                try {
                    const successful = document.execCommand('copy');
                    if (successful) {
                        resolve();
                    } else {
                        reject(new Error("execCommand returned false"));
                    }
                } catch (err) {
                    reject(err);
                } finally {
                    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                }
            });
        }

        copyBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
            try {
                if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
                    try {
                        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(rawMarkdownText);
                    } catch (e) {
                        await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                    }
                } else {
                    await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                }

                const originalSvg = copyIcon.innerHTML;
                copyIcon.innerHTML = `<polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>`;

                copyText.textContent = "Copied!";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.style.color = "#10b981";

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyIcon.innerHTML = originalSvg;
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.style.color = "";
                }, 2000);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Failed to copy text: ', err);
                copyText.textContent = "Failed";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.title = err.toString();

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.title = "Copy Markdown";
                }, 3000);
            }
        });

        openBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!currentFilePath) return;

            const reqId = Date.now();

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                id: reqId,
                method: "tools/call",
                params: {
                    name: "open_local_file",
                    arguments: {
                        file_path: currentFilePath
                    }
                }
            }, "*");

            openText.textContent = "Opening...";
            openText.style.display = "inline";
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                openText.style.display = "none";
                openText.textContent = "";
            }, 2000);
        });

        function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
            return (unsafe || "").toString()
                .replace(/&/g, "&")
                .replace(/</g, "<")
                .replace(/>/g, ">")
                .replace(/"/g, """)
                .replace(/'/g, "'");
        }

        function showError(title, message, details = null) {
            let html = `
            <div class="alert">
                <div class="alert-title">
                    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"></line></svg>
                    ${escapeHtml(title)}
                </div>
                <div class="alert-body">${escapeHtml(message)}</div>
            `;
            if (details) {
                html += `<div class="alert-details">${escapeHtml(details)}</div>`;
            }
            html += `</div>`;
            appDiv.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function checkCollapsible() {
            const wrapper = document.getElementById('content-wrapper');
            const toggleContainer = document.getElementById('toggle-container');
            const fadeOverlay = document.getElementById('fade-overlay');
            const toggleIcon = document.getElementById('toggle-icon');
            const toggleText = document.getElementById('toggle-text');

            // 1. If no markdown, we are showing the skeleton. Do not collapse!
            if (!rawMarkdownText) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                triggerResize();
                return;
            }

            // 2. Data is loaded
            const realHeight = appDiv.scrollHeight;
            const COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD = 300;
            const COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = 150;
            const EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT = 500;

            if (realHeight > COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                if (isExpanded) {
                    // Open view! Scroll inside max 500px window
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'auto';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show Less';
                } else {
                    // Collapsed View
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = COLLAPSED_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'hidden';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'block';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show More';
                }
            } else {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
            }

            triggerResize();
        }

        document.getElementById('toggle-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            isExpanded = !isExpanded;
            checkCollapsible();
        });

        function triggerResize() {
            // Measure the exact unconstrained height of the outer card
            const card = document.querySelector('.adeu-card');
            const containerChrome = 34; // 16px padding top/bottom + 2px borders

            const requestedHeight = card.offsetHeight + containerChrome;

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                params: { height: Math.ceil(requestedHeight), width: 600 }
            }, "*");
        }

        window.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
            try {
                if (!event.data || event.data.jsonrpc !== "2.0") return;
                const msg = event.data;

                if (msg.id === INIT_ID) {
                    window.parent.postMessage({
                        jsonrpc: "2.0",
                        method: "ui/notifications/initialized",
                        params: {}
                    }, "*");
                    return;
                }

                if (msg.method === "ui/notifications/tool-result") {
                    if (window.__MARKED_ERROR || typeof marked === 'undefined') {
                        showError("Missing Dependency", "The Markdown renderer failed to load.", window.__MARKED_ERROR || "marked is undefined.");
                        return;
                    }

                    const result = msg.params;

                    // If the state is pending, or no markdown is returned, completely hide the UI
                    if (!result || !result.structuredContent || result.structuredContent.status === "pending" || !result.structuredContent.markdown) {
                        document.documentElement.style.display = 'none';
                        window.parent.postMessage({
                            jsonrpc: "2.0",
                            method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                            params: { height: 0, width: 0 }
                        }, "*");
                        return;
                    }

                    // Render Markdown
                    rawMarkdownText = result.structuredContent.markdown;
                    if (result.structuredContent.file_path) {
                        currentFilePath = result.structuredContent.file_path;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'flex';
                    } else {
                        currentFilePath = null;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                    appDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(rawMarkdownText);
                    copyBtn.style.display = 'flex';

                    if (result.structuredContent.title) {
                        navTitle.textContent = result.structuredContent.title;
                        navTitle.title = result.structuredContent.title;
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                showError("Rendering Engine Error", "An unexpected error occurred.", error.toString() + "\n" + error.stack);
            }
        });

        const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => {
            checkCollapsible();
        });
        observer.observe(appDiv);

        window.parent.postMessage({
            jsonrpc: "2.0",
            id: INIT_ID,
            method: "ui/initialize",
            params: {
                appInfo: { name: "Adeu Markdown UI", version: "1.1.0" },
                appCapabilities: {},
                protocolVersion: "2025-11-21"
            }
        }, "*");
    </script>
</body>

</html>
